name: @burakaydinofficial/unity-editor-mcp
description: MCP server for Unity Editor integration - enables AI assistants to control Unity Editor

scripts.test:ci: c8 --reporter=lcov --check-coverage=false node --test tests/unit/core/config.test.js tests/unit/core/discovery.test.js tests/unit/core/handshake.test.js tests/unit/core/schemaValidator.test.js tests/unit/core/editorToolSurface.test.js tests/unit/core/nodeLogicTools.test.js tests/unit/core/unityConnectionManager.test.js tests/unit/core/unityConnection.errors.test.js tests/unit/core/unityConnection.retry.test.js tests/unit/core/server.test.js tests/unit/handlers/instances/ListUnityInstancesToolHandler.test.js tests/unit/handlers/instances/MetaTools.test.js tests/unit/handlers/BaseToolHandler.test.js tests/unit/handlers/menu/ExecuteMenuItemToolHandler.test.js tests/unit/handlers/scripting/CreateScriptToolHandler.test.js tests/unit/handlers/screenshot/AnalyzeScreenshotToolHandler.test.js tests/security/menu-security-patch.test.js tests/unit/core/roslynManager.test.js tests/unit/core/roslynTools.test.js tests/unit/core/roslynSidecar.test.js
